title: Banana pickaxe
description: This resource pack changes both the texture and the name of the netherite pickaxe.
body:
Description
Get ready for fun in Minecraft! This pack turns the **Netherite Pickaxe** into the **Banana Pickaxe** and also changes its **name**. Bright, colorful, and full of personality, it’s fun to use while mining, exploring the Nether, or showing off to friends. **Easy to install** and works with vanilla Minecraft, this quirky pickaxe will make you never want a normal one again!


<details>
<summary>License & Usage</summary>

This resource pack may be used and included in modpacks. Modifications and adaptations are allowed, provided that proper **credit is given to the original creator**.

</details>
